message:

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "buildpacks-468-docker-image-with-pack",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "buildpacks: Docker Image with Pack",
+    "description": "Docker Image with Pack. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current buildpacks setup",
+        "description": "Verify your buildpacks version and configuration:\n```bash\npack version\n```\nThis feature requires a working buildpacks installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review buildpacks configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant buildpacks configuration:\n### Description\nAs part of the release process, create & publish a Docker image that contains pack, like:\nhttps://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/cloud-builders-community/tree/master/pack\n\nTo use pack from systems like GitHub Actions, Cloud Build,"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Docker Image with Pack",
+        "description": "## Summary\n\nThis PR adds a Github action to release a `pack` Docker image to `cnbs/pack` on a new release. It currently creates three tags:\n* `buildpacksio/pack:0.11.2`\n* `buildpacksio/pack:latest`\n\nI ran it, and created the images at `dfreilich/pack:...`\n \n## Output\n\n`$ act -j deliver-docker -s\n```yaml\nFROM alpine:3.10\n\nARG PACK_VERSION\nENV PACK_URL https://github.com/buildpack/pack/releases/download/${PACK_VERSION}/pack-${PACK_VERSION}-linux.tgz\nRUN wget -O- \"${PACK_URL}\" | tar -C /usr/local/bin -xz pack\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Docker Image with Pack\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Summary\n\nThis PR adds a Github action to release a `pack` Docker image to `cnbs/pack` on a new release.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "FROM alpine:3.10\n\nARG PACK_VERSION\nENV PACK_URL https://github.com/buildpack/pack/releases/download/${PACK_VERSION}/pack-${PACK_VERSION}-linux.tgz\nRUN wget -O- \"${PACK_URL}\" | tar -C /usr/local/bin -xz pack",
+        "FROM busybox\nENV PACK_VERSION=v0.7.0\nRUN wget -O- https://github.com/buildpack/pack/releases/download/${PACK_VERSION}/pack-${PACK_VERSION}-linux.tgz | tar zx\n\nFROM gcr.io/distroless/base\nENTRYPOINT [\"/pack\"]\nCOPY --from=0 /pack /"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "buildpacks",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+    ],

+      "pr": "https://github.com/buildpacks/pack/pull/709"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {

+      "pack"
+    ],
+    "description": "A working buildpacks installation or development environment."
+  },
